ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the athlete */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the athlete (M or F) */,
  "noc" TEXT /* National Olympic Committee (NOC) of the athlete */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the athlete */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the athlete participates in */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the athlete in cm */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the athlete in kg */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the athlete belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., individual, team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the event belongs to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., finals, semifinals) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the event (M or F) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "olympic_games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Olympic Game */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the Olympic Game was held */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the Olympic Game was held (Summer or Winter) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the Olympic Game was held */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Opening date of the Olympic Game */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Closing date of the Olympic Game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participations" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete participating in the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the athlete participated in */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Olympic Game the event was part of */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participations_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES olympic_games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participations_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medals" (
  "medal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medal */,
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participation that resulted in the medal */,
  "medal_type" TEXT /* Type of medal won (Gold, Silver, Bronze, or None) */,
  "medal_date" TEXT /* Date the medal was awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_participation_id FOREIGN KEY ("participation_id") REFERENCES participations ("participation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "noc" TEXT /* National Olympic Committee (NOC) of the team */,
  "team_type" TEXT /* Type of team (e.g., national, club) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_participations" (
  "team_participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team participation */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team participating in the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the team participated in */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Olympic Game the event was part of */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_participations_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES olympic_games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_participations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_participations_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, athlete, spectator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged in */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date the user logged in */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date the user logged out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "event_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participation */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the event (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_participation_id FOREIGN KEY ("participation_id") REFERENCES participations ("participation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_schedules" (
  "event_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event schedule */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Olympic Game */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date the event is scheduled */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedules_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedules_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES olympic_games ("game_id")
)
